items.title: Physics-Informed State Space Models for Reliable Solar Irradiance Forecasting in Off-Grid Systems
items.abstract: The stable operation of autonomous off-grid photovoltaic systems dictates reliance on solar forecasting algorithms that respect atmospheric thermodynamics. Contemporary deep learning models consistently exhibit critical anomalies, primarily severe temporal phase lags during cloud transients and phys...

items.title: Detecting Safety Violations Across Many Agent Traces
items.authors: Adam Stein, Davis Brown, Hamed Hassani et al.
items.abstract: To identify safety violations, auditors often search over large sets of agent traces. This search is difficult because failures are often rare, complex, and sometimes even adversarially hidden and only detectable when multiple traces are analyzed together. These challenges arise in diverse settings ...

items.title: Saar-Voice: A Multi-Speaker Saarbrücken Dialect Speech Corpus
items.authors: Lena S. Oberkircher, Jesujoba O. Alabi, Dietrich Klakow et al.
items.abstract: Natural language processing (NLP) and speech technologies have made significant progress in recent years; however, they remain largely focused on standardized language varieties. Dialects, despite their cultural significance and widespread use, are underrepresented in linguistic resources and comput...

items.title: Who Handles Orientation? Investigating Invariance in Feature Matching
items.authors: David Nordström, Johan Edstedt, Fredrik Kahl et al.
items.abstract: Finding matching keypoints between images is a core problem in 3D computer vision. However, modern matchers struggle with large in-plane rotations. A straightforward mitigation is to learn rotation invariance via data augmentation. However, it remains unclear at which stage rotation invariance shoul...

items.title: Pair2Scene: Learning Local Object Relations for Procedural Scene Generation
items.authors: Xingjian Ran, Shujie Zhang, Weipeng Zhong et al.
items.abstract: Generating high-fidelity 3D indoor scenes remains a significant challenge due to data scarcity and the complexity of modeling intricate spatial relations. Current methods often struggle to scale beyond training distribution to dense scenes or rely on LLMs/VLMs that lack the ability for precise spati...

items.title: Solving Physics Olympiad via Reinforcement Learning on Physics Simulators
items.authors: Mihir Prabhudesai, Aryan Satpathy, Yangmin Li et al.
items.abstract: We have witnessed remarkable advances in LLM reasoning capabilities with the advent of DeepSeek-R1. items.title: Disentangled Point Diffusion for Precise Object Placement
items.authors: Lyuxing He, Eric Cai, Shobhit Aggarwal et al.
items.abstract: Recent advances in robotic manipulation have highlighted the effectiveness of learning from demonstration.
